trades.reasoning: Top score 95 with all four signals aligned — RSI in bullish sweet spot (69.9), MACD bullish crossover, rising histogram, and price well above SMA-20; not yet overbought.
Score 95 large-cap with RSI at 60.1 giving plenty of upside runway, MACD crossover and rising histogram confirmed, risk-on tape favors high-beta names.
Score 95 crypto-mining momentum play with RSI 67.9 in bullish zone and MACD histogram accelerating; risk-on environment favors speculative growth names.

decisions.briefing: Markets closed risk-on with S&P +1.0% and NASDAQ +0.8%, giving a green light to deploy the remaining $670 cash into top-tier momentum names. I added LWLG, TSLA, and CLSK — all score-95 with clean technical setups and RSI not yet overbought. Existing positions (XMTR, AMD, EAT, ETSY, LITE, QQQ) show no stop-loss or profit-target triggers, so I held all of them.

market_education.summary_en: Stocks climbed broadly on April 30 as month-end portfolio rebalancing and easing trade-war anxiety pushed the S&P 500 up 1.0% and NASDAQ up 0.8%. Investors rotated back into growth and tech after a volatile April marked by tariff headlines and Fed uncertainty, with improving sentiment around US-China trade negotiations providing a tailwind. The risk-on tone was reinforced by resilient corporate earnings from several mega-caps, encouraging buyers to step back in ahead of the May open.
market_education.summary_zh: 4月30日美股全線上揚，月底投資組合再平衡資金及貿易戰緊張情緒緩和共同推動標普500指數上漲1.0%、納斯達克上漲0.8%。歷經4月份關稅新聞與聯儲局政策不確定性的劇烈震盪後，市場情緒明顯改善，美中貿易談判進展傳出積極訊號，帶動資金重新流入成長股與科技板塊。多家大型企業財報表現強勁，進一步提振投資者信心，風險偏好於5月開盤前夕全面回升。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing means buying stocks that have been rising strongly — on the theory that 'what's going up tends to keep going up' in the short term. Traders look for signals like an RSI between 55–70 (strong but not exhausted) and a bullish MACD crossover to confirm the trend. Today's top picks (LWLG, TSLA, CLSK) were all selected exactly this way: strong recent price moves backed by multiple confirming indicators.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略是指買入近期強勁上漲的股票，理念在於「漲勢持續、趨勢為王」。交易者通常尋找RSI介於55至70之間（動能強勁但尚未過熱）以及MACD黃金交叉等技術訊號來確認趨勢。今日精選的LWLG、TSLA、CLSK，正是依此邏輯選出——近期股價表現亮眼，且多項技術指標同步確認上升趨勢。
